chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2717 - وقال عليه السلام: " لا يذبح الصيد في الحرم وإن صيد في الحل.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2717 - Imam (as) said: "Game should not be slaughtered in the Sacred Sanctuary (Haram), even if it was hunted outside the sanctuary."
